objective: Exercise idempotency, preconditions, duplicate detection, candidate-only imports, source fidelity, loss maps, and authority recheck at delayed sync.

cases.title: Same idempotency key yields one semantic receipt
cases.failureMode: Duplicate retry becomes duplicate import fact.
given: Import candidate endpoint requires idempotency key.
when: Same request is replayed with same idempotency key.
then: Runtime returns existing receipt or replay-used problem; no duplicate fact is created.

assertions.statement: Idempotent replay does not duplicate canonical state.

cases.title: Stale preconditions fail state-sensitive write
cases.failureMode: Last-write-wins overwrites truth or promotion-sensitive state.
when: Request is submitted with stale or missing precondition.
then: Operation is refused with precondition problem; conflict payload includes remediation.

cases.title: Semantic conflict returns merge-helpful problem
cases.failureMode: Conflicts are returned as opaque errors or silent overwrites.
given: Two inconsistent operation claims target same extent/time/material.
then: Runtime returns RuntimeProblem with conflict details, related refs, and next actions.

assertions.statement: Conflict payload has relatedRefs and suggested remediation.

cases.title: Expired cursor is recoverable and not fabricated
cases.failureMode: Client continues stale stream and misses records or fabricates continuity.
given: Trace or sync stream cursor exists.
then: Runtime returns cursor-expired problem and safe restart/checkpoint instructions.

assertions.statement: Expired cursor does not imply no records.

cases.title: Unsupported units create loss map or refusal
cases.failureMode: Adapter silently coerces unsupported unit into canonical value.
given: Import contains unsupported or ambiguous unit.
then: Import result preserves source value, emits loss map, and blocks high-consequence promotion until resolved.

cases.title: Authority is rechecked at delayed sync
cases.failureMode: Offline contractor capture is accepted using stale local authority.
given: Contractor captured work offline before authority revocation.
then: Capture is preserved as historical/local evidence but promotion is denied or review-required.

assertions.statement: Sync-time authorization is authoritative for promotion.

cases.title: Duplicate external records do not become duplicate facts
cases.failureMode: Two adapter imports with same external identity create separate accepted executions.
given: Two candidates share external source IDs/fingerprints.
then: Duplicate suspicion is preserved and acceptance is blocked until review/binding.

assertions.statement: Duplicate candidates remain candidates or review-required.

cases.title: Candidate promotion uses promotion service only
cases.failureMode: Adapter or app internally flips candidate status to accepted.
when: Adapter/app tries to mark it accepted without promotion call.
then: State change is impossible or refused; promotion trace required.

assertions.statement: Candidate status cannot be locally promoted.

acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate and replay paths do not create duplicate accepted facts.
Candidate imports stay candidate-only until governed promotion succeeds.
